resources.string: Batch filter the DCIM file, for use after install or after pausing operation.

The app you want to filter out from DCIM. To find the target package name, either search through your files, or search \'[APP NAME] package name android\'. This app was intended for TikTok, which is \'com.zhiliaoapp.musically\'. This package name should never change, unless the app is reuploaded to the play store by the owner of the app.
The destination folder of where filtered files are moved to
